message:
feat(daemon): add repeat-deletion dampening to break agent rebuild loops and harden temp artifact classification

Two key improvements to the executor and scanner:

1. Repeat-deletion dampening (executor):
   - Add RepeatDeletionTracker with exponential-backoff cooldowns that prevent
     sbh from repeatedly deleting directories that agents immediately rebuild
     (e.g. target/ dirs from agents without CARGO_TARGET_DIR set)
   - Formula: base_cooldown * 2^(cycle_count-1), capped at max_cooldown
   - Red/Critical pressure bypasses all dampening (disk safety always wins)
   - Configurable via SBH_SCANNER_REPEAT_DELETION_BASE_COOLDOWN_SECS (default 300)
     and SBH_SCANNER_REPEAT_DELETION_MAX_COOLDOWN_SECS (default 3600)
   - Periodic pruning of expired entries every 10 batches
   - Add config fields: repeat_deletion_base_cooldown_secs, repeat_deletion_max_cooldown_secs

2. Temp artifact fast-track hardening:
   - Never fast-track NodeModules or PythonCache categories by category alone,
     even in /tmp — these can include active dependency trees
   - Add test: temp_artifact_age_fast_track_skips_node_modules_and_pycache

3. Minor TUI fixes in render.rs and runtime.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
